mapper.sql: id, project_id, username, dictionary_id, name, data_type, dictionary, version, sort_order, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by
mapper.update: UPDATE sas_dictionaries_data SET dictionary_id = #{dictionaryId}, name = #{name}, data_type = #{dataType}, dictionary = #{dictionary}, version = #{version}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_time = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sas_dictionaries_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sas_dictionaries_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
